type.description: Indicates the type of object returned. In this case, `type` returns `group`.

links.description: Contains pagination links for the collection.

first.description: Link to retrieve information in the first page of the collection.

last.description: Link to the retrieve information in the last page of the collection.

next.description: Link to retrieve information in the next page of the collection.

prev.description: Link to retrieve information in the previous page of the collection.

self.description: Link to retrieve information in the current page of the collection.
